scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 401 Unauthorized [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] WWW-Authenticate: DIGEST qop="auth",nonce="BroadWorksXjlq5g4xcThm5i20BW",realm="origin.com.au",algorithm=MD5 Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=2 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000
